text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My body isn't very strong... That's what
Manhattan Cafe said...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My body feels... heavy today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some days are like that. I'm about to tell her to
take it easy and rest, when—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Kssshhh... Kssshhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice something bizarre. There's a trail where
Manhattan Cafe walked, but it looks as if a heavy
object was dragged through the sand.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My weight... I've never seen these numbers
before... What's happening?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her weight gain is abnormally drastic. And it
doesn't end there...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... My body feels dry and brittle today...
It's as if my entire body's shriveled up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Screeech! Crack!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ngh?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My... toenails... They're...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pulls off her shoes in a panic. Her dry toenails
have cracked, leaving behind what look like small
holes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My weight... I feel incredibly light today...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That explains why I can't muster any energy... This
dryness must have caused the cracks in my nails,
too...
choice_data_list: Let's file down your nails and disinfect them.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What? ...How does that... work?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Using some specialized medicine and supports,
we reinforce her nails. It doesn't look like she'll
have to take a break from races or training...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You're amazing... Thanks to your thorough
treatment, I feel a lot better now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But more importantly, what's behind these drastic
fluctuations in her weight? I figure it's time to try
and get some answers.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My appetite... I do get intense cravings
sometimes. It feels as if my stomach turns into a
bottomless pit...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I eat and eat, but I never feel full... so I just end
up feasting mindlessly...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But then at other times, I can't eat a thing. Even
when I try and force the food into my mouth, my
hand completely freezes up...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... it's not my will that's stopping my hand.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I don't know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is she struggling to maintain her diet? Or is this a
case of paranormal activity? Our conversation
leaves me with no idea. But for now...
choice_data_list:
Send me a photo the next time something
strange happens.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A photo... Okay. I'll send you pictures, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I receive a photo from
Manhattan Cafe. But the picture itself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaves me baffled. All I can make out is a strange
pattern.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That keeps happening. Which is why I haven't
been able to send you any pictures of the
affected areas...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's... always been like this, so there's probably
nothing we can do... I think my body will always
be like this...
choice_data_list: Just give me a call and we'll work things out!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Give you a call? Do you mean... whenever I like?
choice_data_list: Yes, so I can patch you up!
Yes, so I can patch you up!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... so much...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If you don't mind helping me whenever something
happens, we could figure things out somehow,
and maybe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I rack my brains for a solution and
eventually come up with a comprehensive
treatment plan for nursing Manhattan Cafe back
into shape. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This isn't a matter of her body being weak. The
level of weakness, and the abnormality of it all...
feels borderline supernatural.
